actual_improvements: Asset-reference validation now catches stale provided manifests where question-bank image paths are absent from manifest canonical_path entries.
The default asset-reference gate can validate the current question bank without requiring generated companion sidecars to exist on disk, while surfacing missing sidecars as warnings.
A strict companion-input mode now exists for release-style checks that must require persisted asset_manifest, Asterion exports, Content Lab export, and topic-routing sidecar.
Output-integrity audits now group unexpected missing mark-scheme records by paper/source companion with complete affected question IDs and question numbers.
Output-integrity audits can infer source companion keys from canonical paper IDs when source PDF metadata is absent, making the 74 live missing mark-scheme records actionable by likely companion.
fake_progress: No iteration repaired the actual 74 missing mark-scheme image paths in output/json/question_bank.json.
No iteration generated or validated persisted Asterion exports, Content Lab export, topic-routing sidecar, or asset_manifest.v1.json.
The report enrichments make failures more actionable but do not prove PNG content alignment.
bloat_introduced: Five iteration directories and several live audit JSON reports were added under .agent-runs as expected loop artifacts.
src/exam_bank/asset_manifest.py gained a small derived-manifest helper that overlaps with build_asset_manifest_payload logic; keep it from expanding further.
cleanup_required: Do not delete .agent-runs artifacts for this run; they are the requested audit trail.
Before the next cycle, decide whether strict companion-input validation belongs in release documentation or command atlas.
Use the iteration-05 grouped output-integrity report to choose one high-count missing mark-scheme paper group for actual output repair.
agent_failure_patterns: Agent 1 in iteration 1 selected a validator improvement before the live gate was runnable; later iterations corrected that by probing live gates.
Agent 4 repeatedly returned pass_with_risks because the loop improved detection/reportability while the live dataset still contains missing mark-scheme paths.
No agent exceeded the file-change budget or wrote generated reports outside .agent-runs.
planner_policy_updates: For the next cycle, prioritize one actual missing mark-scheme group repair over additional audit-report enrichment.
Require planners to run the smallest live gate probe before selecting a report-only slice, unless the live gate is already known to be blocked.
Keep strict-vs-lenient validation modes explicit in plans where a check can be used both locally and for release gating.
backlog_updates: Add: Repair one high-count unexpected missing mark-scheme group using inferred source companion evidence from output-integrity audit.
Add: Decide whether missing companion sidecars should be generated, documented as optional, or required by strict release gates.
Keep: Validate question-to-mark-scheme pairing and crop contamination after missing mark-scheme path debt is reduced.
next_cycle_focus: Repair one high-count missing mark-scheme group from the iteration-05 output-integrity report, starting with a full-paper group such as 13winter12, 12winter16, 33winter11, 33winter17, or 42summer19. First determine whether the mark-scheme source PDF is absent, extraction failed, or output records are stale; then make the smallest source/test change that prevents that group from staying silently incomplete.
